computation_process.description: Mandatory sequence for the generated script (04_knowledge base).

steps.description: Nodes, members, support_nodes from topology ([0, num_bays]). If BESO: chord_indices, web_indices. Load nodes/values (tributary, top chord).
BESO: chord protection, only webs removable. Else: discrete profile per member. Stress + slenderness + buckling.
Load vector (G, Q, ULS). FEA: K, BCs, solve, strains/stresses. Halt on LinAlgError. Profile or area update.
Init areas. Loop: FEA → update areas. Final FEA, then output.
Build geometric_output dict. MUST write geometric_output.json in script directory (and print). Filter min area.

computation_process.beso_chord_protection: Only web members removable; chords resized, not removed. chord_indices, web_indices from geometry.
computation_process.fea_singular_handling: On LinAlgError: halt loop, log, do not crash.

output.description: The script MUST produce and write geometric_output.json. No file = pipeline broken.
output.path_rule: Script dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)); write file there. Mandatory.

schema.description: 2D truss [x, z], m, kN. Pinned supports.
schema.loads: [ [x,z,Fz], ... ] ULS point loads at top chord.

material: Catalogue = list of profile names at runtime; script embeds HEA A, I_y, i_y.
